chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1440 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2017. Mr. Wahid Bux Aajiz Laghari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. The petitioner has alleged harassment against the private respondents and police officials at their behest. Learned A.A.G has filed the comments of respondents No.2 and 3, who have denied causing ever any harassment to the petitioner at the instance of private respondents. We have seen the record which shows that the petitioner has already filed a F.C Suit No. 74/2017 against the private respondents as well as official respondents on the dispute agitated by him before us which is over a plot situated in Deh Umerkot. He has converted that dispute into his complaint against the police officials to maintain this petition. Nothing has been brought on record to show that ever any harassment has been caused to the petitioner by the official respondents at the behest of private respondents. Therefore, we see no merit in this petition, and dismiss it accordingly. The petitioner, however, may approach the civil court where his case is pending for redressal of his grievance, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
